desc: Returns elements inside an architectural room (by number or name).
summary: Returns elements inside an architectural room (by number or name). Optionally sets Revit selection to those elements. Uses GetElementsInRoomHelper.ResolveRoom to find the room and GetElementsInRoomHelper.GetElementsInRoom to collect elements within it. Called by MEPBridge.Revit.AIChat.Services.CustomTools.SelectByRoomTool via execute_command. Related: SelectByIdsCommand for ID-based selection, SelectByLocationCommand for coordinate-based selection.
usecase: List/filter elements in a room; then use get_selection or SelectByIdsCommand for cross-off.
notfor: Selecting by coordinates — use SelectByLocationCommand. Selecting by ID — use SelectByIdsCommand.
precondition: Active document; roomNumber or roomName required.
postcondition: Returns { success, count, room, items }; optionally selection set.

config_inputs.name: setSelection
config_inputs.description: If true, set Revit selection to elements in room

preprompts: Finding elements in the specified room...
thinkingsteps: Resolving room by number or name...
failureprompts: Could not find elements in room: {error}
